title: Public Involvement and Consultations - Canada.ca
content:
## Public Involvement and Consultations
Effective and meaningful public involvement is essential to enable Health Canada to fulfill its legislative mandate, deliver programs, launch new initiatives and build public trust.

## Health Canada's Role
Health Canada provides information and opportunities for Canadians to become meaningfully involved in our decision-making processes regarding priorities, policies and programs.

## What Information Can You Find Here?
In this section you will find information on public involvement and consultation related to drugs and health products. Using the menu on the left side of the page select the subject area of interest to you.
- HPFB Public Advisory Committee
- All consultations at Health Canada
